name: Callipeen
description: A Jakobs sniper family built around strong base damage and a straightforward marksman feel. Lower-quality versions behave more like slow bolt-action rifles, while better rolls can fire more quickly and feel closer to semi-auto snipers. Overall, it is a flexible general-purpose sniper line rather than a gimmick weapon.
notes: It can drop as a regular world item from suitable loot sources. A Gearbox-branded version was available through the Premiere Club pre-order bonus. Some scope markings include Cyrillic text that references killing or assassination.
